sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103439" key="tetrame/trhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρᾰ-μέτρητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103439.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing four</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μετρηταί</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
